    registerComponentStore,
    setComponent,
 )
import System.Agents.OS.Persistence (PersistenceHandle, createPersistenceBackend)
import System.Agents.OS.Persistence.Types (PersistenceBackendType (..))
import System.Agents.OS.Resources (ResourceContext (..), ResourceRegistry, ScopeLevel (..), createResource, newResourceRegistry)
import System.Agents.OS.Conversation (
    ConversationConfig (..),
    ConversationState (..),
    ConversationStatus (..),
    Lineage (..),
    Message (..),
    MessageRole (..),
    TurnConfig (..),
    TurnState (..),
    TurnStatus (..),
    emptyLineage,
    FrameType (..),
 )
import System.Agents.Session.Base (
    Agent (..),
    ContextConfig (..),
    LlmCompletion (..),
    LlmResponse (..),
    LlmTurnContent (..),
    LlmToolCall (..),
    Session (..),
    SessionProgress (..),
    SystemPrompt (..),
    UserQuery (..),
    defaultContextConfig,
    ignoreSessionProgress,
 )
import qualified System.Agents.Session.Base as Session
import System.Agents.Session.Loop (run)
import System.Agents.Session.OpenAI (OpenAICompletionConfig (..), mkOpenAICompletion)
import System.Agents.Session.Step (naiveTilNoToolCallStep)
import qualified System.Agents.Session.Types as SessionTypes
import System.Agents.SessionStore (SessionStore, mkSessionStore)
import qualified System.Agents.SessionStore as SessionStore
import System.Agents.ToolPortal (makeToolPortal)
import System.Agents.ToolRegistration (ToolRegistration (..))
import System.Agents.ToolSchema (ToolName (..), ToolDescription (..), ParamProperty (..), ParamType (..))
import System.Agents.Tools.Context (ToolExecutionContext, ctxConversationId)
import System.Agents.Tools.ExecuteToolCall (executeLlmToolCall)
import qualified System.Agents.Session.Compat as SessionCompat
import System.Agents.TUI.Types (
    AgentBus (..),
    AgentRole (..),
    AgentRoleConfig (..),
    CoordinationStrategy (..),
    InterAgentMessage (..),
    LayoutMode (..),
    MessageType (..),
 )

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Tracing
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Trace events from the TUI interface.
data TUITrace
    = TUITrace_Initialize Text
    | TUITrace_AgentRegistered AgentId Text
    | TUITrace_AgentUnregistered AgentId
    | TUITrace_ConversationStarted ConversationId AgentId
    | TUITrace_ConversationPaused ConversationId
    | TUITrace_ConversationResumed ConversationId
    | TUITrace_ConversationEnded ConversationId
    | TUITrace_UserMessage ConversationId Text
    | TUITrace_AgentResponse ConversationId Text
    | TUITrace_ToolCalled ConversationId Text
    | TUITrace_SessionProgress SessionProgress
    | TUITrace_MultiAgentConfigured Int
    | TUITrace_LayoutChanged LayoutMode
    | TUITrace_Error Text
    deriving (Show)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Persistence Configuration
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Persistence configuration for TUI sessions.
data TUIPersistence
    = -- | No session persistence
      TUIPersistence_None
    | -- | Persist to SessionStore
      TUIPersistence_SessionStore SessionStore
    | -- | Persist to SQLite database
      TUIPersistence_Sqlite FilePath
    | -- | Persist to both
      TUIPersistence_Both SessionStore FilePath
    | -- | Custom persistence
      TUIPersistence_Custom PersistenceHandle
    deriving (Show)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- TUI Interface Configuration
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Configuration for the TUI interface.
data TUIInterfaceConfig = TUIInterfaceConfig
    { tuiDefaultLayout :: LayoutMode
    -- ^ Default layout mode
    , tuiEnableMultiAgent :: Bool
    -- ^ Enable multi-agent coordination features
    , tuiMaxConversations :: Int
    -- ^ Maximum concurrent conversations per agent
    , tuiPersistence :: TUIPersistence
    -- ^ Session persistence configuration
    , tuiEnableProgressiveDisclosure :: Bool
    -- ^ Enable progressive tool disclosure
    , tuiOnSessionProgress :: Session.OnSessionProgress
    -- ^ Callback for session progress
    , tuiResourceContext :: ResourceContext
    -- ^ Resource context
    , tuiEventBufferSize :: Int
    -- ^ Size of event buffer (default: 100)
    }
    deriving (Show)

-- | Default TUI interface configuration.
defaultTUIInterfaceConfig :: IO TUIInterfaceConfig
defaultTUIInterfaceConfig = do
    registry <- newResourceRegistry
    let ctx = ResourceContext [ProgramScope] registry
    pure
        TUIInterfaceConfig
            { tuiDefaultLayout = SingleAgent
            , tuiEnableMultiAgent = False
            , tuiMaxConversations = 5
            , tuiPersistence = TUIPersistence_None
            , tuiEnableProgressiveDisclosure = True
            , tuiOnSessionProgress = ignoreSessionProgress
            , tuiResourceContext = ctx
            , tuiEventBufferSize = 100
            }

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Agent Registration
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Information about a registered agent.
data AgentRegistration = AgentRegistration
    { arAgentId :: AgentId
    , arNode :: OSAgentNode
    , arCreatedAt :: UTCTime
    }
    deriving (Show)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Conversation Handle
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Status of a TUI conversation (distinct from ConversationStatus in Conversation module).
data TUIConversationStatus
    = TUIConversationStatus_Active
    | TUIConversationStatus_WaitingForInput
    | TUIConversationStatus_Paused
    | TUIConversationStatus_Completed
    | TUIConversationStatus_Failed Text
    deriving (Show, Eq)

-- | Handle to a conversation within the TUI.
data ConversationHandle = ConversationHandle
    { tchConversationId :: ConversationId
    , tchAgentId :: AgentId
    , tchSession :: TVar Session
    -- ^ Current session state (mutable)
    , tchStatus :: TVar TUIConversationStatus
    -- ^ Current status
    , tchAsync :: TVar (Maybe (Async ()))
    -- ^ Async handle for running conversation
    , tchMessageQueue :: TQueue Text
    -- ^ Queue for user messages
    , tchEventQueue :: BChan TUIEvent
    -- ^ Events to the UI
    , tchCreatedAt :: UTCTime
    }

-- | Manual Show instance for ConversationHandle
instance Show ConversationHandle where
    show ch =
        "ConversationHandle {tchConversationId = "
            ++ show ch.tchConversationId
            ++ ", tchAgentId = "
            ++ show ch.tchAgentId
            ++ ", tchCreatedAt = "
            ++ show ch.tchCreatedAt
            ++ ", ...}"

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- TUI Events
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Role for messages in TUI events (distinct from MessageRole in Conversation module).
data TUIEventMessageRole = TUIEventRole_User | TUIEventRole_Agent | TUIEventRole_System | TUIEventRole_Tool
    deriving (Show, Eq)

-- | Events that can occur in the TUI.
data TUIEvent
    = TUIEvent_ConversationStarted ConversationId AgentId
    | TUIEvent_ConversationMessage ConversationId TUIEventMessageRole Text
    | TUIEvent_ConversationStatusChanged ConversationId TUIConversationStatus
    | TUIEvent_ToolCallStarted ConversationId Text
    | TUIEvent_ToolCallCompleted ConversationId Text Value
    | TUIEvent_SessionUpdated ConversationId Session
    | TUIEvent_AgentError ConversationId Text
    | TUIEvent_InterAgentMessage AgentId AgentId MessageType Value
    | TUIEvent_Shutdown
    | TUIEvent_Error Text
    deriving (Show)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- TUI Interface Handle
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Handle for TUI-specific interface operations.
data TUIInterfaceHandle = TUIInterfaceHandle
    { tuiConfig :: TUIInterfaceConfig
    -- ^ Configuration
    , tuiWorld :: World
    -- ^ OS ECS world
    , tuiRegistry :: ResourceRegistry
    -- ^ Resource registry
    , tuiRegisteredAgents :: TVar (Map AgentId AgentRegistration)
    -- ^ Registered agents
    , tuiConversations :: TVar (Map ConversationId ConversationHandle)
    -- ^ Active conversations
    , tuiLayout :: TVar LayoutMode
    -- ^ Current layout mode
    , tuiAgentBus :: Maybe AgentBus
    -- ^ Optional agent bus for multi-agent
    , tuiMultiAgentConfig :: TVar (Maybe MultiAgentConfig)
    -- ^ Multi-agent configuration
    , tuiEventQueue :: TQueue TUIEvent
    -- ^ Global event queue
    , tuiSubscribers :: TVar [TQueue TUIEvent]
    -- ^ Event subscribers
    , tuiTracer :: Tracer IO TUITrace
    -- ^ Event tracer
    , tuiShutdownVar :: TVar Bool
    -- ^ Shutdown flag
    , tuiEventThread :: TVar (Maybe ThreadId)
    -- ^ Event loop thread
    }

-- | Multi-agent configuration.
data MultiAgentConfig = MultiAgentConfig
    { maAgents :: [AgentRoleConfig]
    , maCoordinationStrategy :: CoordinationStrategy
    }
    deriving (Show)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Initialization
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

{- | Initialize the TUI interface.

Creates the OS world, initializes resources, and prepares for agent
registration and conversation management.

Example:

@
config <- defaultTUIInterfaceConfig
handle <- initTUIInterface config tracer
@
-}
initTUIInterface ::
    TUIInterfaceConfig ->
    Tracer IO TUITrace ->
    IO TUIInterfaceHandle
initTUIInterface config tracer = do
    -- Create OS world with component stores
    world <- atomically $ do
        w <- newWorld
        w1 <- registerComponentStore w (Proxy @OS.AgentConfig)
        w2 <- registerComponentStore w1 (Proxy @OS.AgentState)
        w3 <- registerComponentStore w2 (Proxy @ConversationConfig)
        w4 <- registerComponentStore w3 (Proxy @ConversationState)
        w5 <- registerComponentStore w4 (Proxy @TurnConfig)
        w6 <- registerComponentStore w5 (Proxy @TurnState)
        w7 <- registerComponentStore w6 (Proxy @Message)
        pure w7

    -- Initialize persistence if needed
    case tuiPersistence config of
        TUIPersistence_Sqlite path -> do
            _ <- createPersistenceBackend (SqliteBackendType path)
            pure ()
        TUIPersistence_Both _ path -> do
            _ <- createPersistenceBackend (SqliteBackendType path)
            pure ()
        _ -> pure ()

    -- Create state vars
    agentsVar <- newTVarIO Map.empty
    conversationsVar <- newTVarIO Map.empty
    layoutVar <- newTVarIO (tuiDefaultLayout config)
    multiAgentVar <- newTVarIO Nothing
    eventQueue <- atomically newTQueue
    subscribersVar <- newTVarIO []
    shutdownVar <- newTVarIO False
    eventThreadVar <- newTVarIO Nothing

    -- Create agent bus if multi-agent enabled
    agentBus <-
        if tuiEnableMultiAgent config
            then Just <$> createAgentBus
            else pure Nothing

    runTracer tracer $ TUITrace_Initialize "TUI interface initialized"

    pure
        TUIInterfaceHandle
            { tuiConfig = config
            , tuiWorld = world
            , tuiRegistry = contextRegistry $ tuiResourceContext config
            , tuiRegisteredAgents = agentsVar
            , tuiConversations = conversationsVar
            , tuiLayout = layoutVar
            , tuiAgentBus = agentBus
            , tuiMultiAgentConfig = multiAgentVar
            , tuiEventQueue = eventQueue
            , tuiSubscribers = subscribersVar
            , tuiTracer = tracer
            , tuiShutdownVar = shutdownVar
            , tuiEventThread = eventThreadVar
            }

{- | Initialize with an existing world.
-}
initTUIInterfaceWithWorld ::
    TUIInterfaceConfig ->
    Tracer IO TUITrace ->
    World ->
    IO TUIInterfaceHandle
initTUIInterfaceWithWorld config tracer world = do
    agentsVar <- newTVarIO Map.empty
    conversationsVar <- newTVarIO Map.empty
    layoutVar <- newTVarIO (tuiDefaultLayout config)
    multiAgentVar <- newTVarIO Nothing
    eventQueue <- atomically newTQueue
    subscribersVar <- newTVarIO []
    shutdownVar <- newTVarIO False
    eventThreadVar <- newTVarIO Nothing

    agentBus <-
        if tuiEnableMultiAgent config
            then Just <$> createAgentBus
            else pure Nothing

    runTracer tracer $ TUITrace_Initialize "TUI interface initialized with existing world"

    pure
        TUIInterfaceHandle
            { tuiConfig = config
            , tuiWorld = world
            , tuiRegistry = contextRegistry $ tuiResourceContext config
            , tuiRegisteredAgents = agentsVar
            , tuiConversations = conversationsVar
            , tuiLayout = layoutVar
            , tuiAgentBus = agentBus
            , tuiMultiAgentConfig = multiAgentVar
            , tuiEventQueue = eventQueue
            , tuiSubscribers = subscribersVar
            , tuiTracer = tracer
            , tuiShutdownVar = shutdownVar
            , tuiEventThread = eventThreadVar
            }

-- | Create a new agent bus.
createAgentBus :: IO AgentBus
createAgentBus = do
    channels <- newTVarIO Map.empty
    pure $ AgentBus channels

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Agent Management
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

{- | Register a new agent with the TUI interface.

Creates an OS entity for the agent and stores the node reference.
-}
registerAgent ::
    TUIInterfaceHandle ->
    OSAgentNode ->
    IO AgentId
registerAgent handle node = do
    let world = tuiWorld handle
    let tracer = tuiTracer handle
    let agentCfg = osNodeConfig node

    -- Generate entity ID
    eid <- createEntity
    let agentId = AgentId (unEntityId eid)

    -- Create OS agent config
    let osConfig =
            AgentConfig
                { agentName = AgentTree.slug agentCfg
                , agentModel =
                    ModelConfig
                        { modelFlavor = AgentTree.flavor agentCfg
                        , modelUrl = AgentTree.modelUrl agentCfg
                        , modelName = AgentTree.modelName agentCfg
                        , modelApiKeyId = apiKeyId agentCfg
                        }
                , agentSystemPrompt = Text.unlines $ AgentTree.systemPrompt agentCfg
                , agentToolboxBindings = []
                }

    -- Create initial agent state
    now <- getCurrentTime
    let osState =
            AgentState
                { agentStatus = AgentIdle
                , agentCurrentConversation = Nothing
                , agentCreatedAt = now
                }

    -- Store in world
    atomically $ do
        setComponent world eid osConfig
        setComponent world eid osState

    -- Create registration
    let registration =
            AgentRegistration
                { arAgentId = agentId
                , arNode = node
                , arCreatedAt = now
                }

    -- Store registration
    atomically $ modifyTVar' (tuiRegisteredAgents handle) (Map.insert agentId registration)

    runTracer tracer $ TUITrace_AgentRegistered agentId (AgentTree.slug agentCfg)

    pure agentId

{- | Unregister an agent from the TUI interface.

Ends all conversations and cleans up resources.
-}
unregisterAgent :: TUIInterfaceHandle -> AgentId -> IO ()
unregisterAgent handle agentId = do
    let tracer = tuiTracer handle

    -- End all conversations for this agent
    convs <- readTVarIO (tuiConversations handle)
    forM_ (Map.toList convs) $ \(convId, conv) -> do
        when (tchAgentId conv == agentId) $ do
            endConversation handle convId

    -- Remove from registered agents
    atomically $ modifyTVar' (tuiRegisteredAgents handle) (Map.delete agentId)

    -- Update agent state in world
    let world = tuiWorld handle
    atomically $ modifyComponent world (EntityId $ unAgentId agentId) $ \s ->
        s{agentStatus = AgentError "Unregistered"}

    runTracer tracer $ TUITrace_AgentUnregistered agentId

{- | Get all registered agents.
-}
getRegisteredAgents :: TUIInterfaceHandle -> IO [(AgentId, AgentRegistration)]
getRegisteredAgents handle = do
    Map.toList <$> readTVarIO (tuiRegisteredAgents handle)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Layout Management
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

{- | Set the current layout mode.
-}
setLayoutMode :: TUIInterfaceHandle -> LayoutMode -> IO ()
setLayoutMode handle mode = do
    atomically $ writeTVar (tuiLayout handle) mode
    runTracer (tuiTracer handle) $ TUITrace_LayoutChanged mode

{- | Get the current layout mode.
-}
getLayoutMode :: TUIInterfaceHandle -> IO LayoutMode
getLayoutMode handle =
    readTVarIO (tuiLayout handle)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Multi-Agent Coordination
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

{- | Configure multi-agent mode.

Validates that all configured agents are registered and stores
the configuration for coordination.
-}
configureMultiAgent :: TUIInterfaceHandle -> MultiAgentConfig -> IO ()
configureMultiAgent handle config = do
    let tracer = tuiTracer handle

    -- Validate that all configured agents are registered
    registered <- getRegisteredAgents handle
    let registeredIds = Set.fromList $ map fst registered
    let configuredIds = Set.fromList $ map arcAgentId (maAgents config)

    if configuredIds `Set.isSubsetOf` registeredIds
        then do
            atomically $ writeTVar (tuiMultiAgentConfig handle) (Just config)
            runTracer tracer $ TUITrace_MultiAgentConfigured (length $ maAgents config)
        else do
            let missing = Set.difference configuredIds registeredIds
            runTracer tracer $ TUITrace_Error $ "Multi-agent config references unregistered agents: " <> Text.pack (show missing)
            error $ "Multi-agent configuration error: Some agents are not registered"

{- | Send a message from one agent to another.
-}
sendInterAgentMessage ::
    TUIInterfaceHandle ->
    -- | From agent
    AgentId ->
    -- | To agent
    AgentId ->
    -- | Message type
    MessageType ->
    -- | Content
    Value ->
    IO ()
sendInterAgentMessage handle fromAgent toAgent msgType content = do
    case tuiAgentBus handle of
        Nothing -> pure () -- Multi-agent not enabled
        Just bus -> do
            let message =
                    InterAgentMessage
                        { iamFrom = fromAgent
                        , iamTo = toAgent
                        , iamType = msgType
                        , iamContent = content
                        }

            -- Get or create channel for target agent
            channels <- readTVarIO (busChannels bus)
            case Map.lookup toAgent channels of
                Just queue -> atomically $ writeTQueue queue message
                Nothing -> do
                    -- Create new channel
                    newQueue <- atomically newTQueue
                    atomically $ modifyTVar' (busChannels bus) (Map.insert toAgent newQueue)
                    atomically $ writeTQueue newQueue message

            -- Emit event
            emitEvent handle $ TUIEvent_InterAgentMessage fromAgent toAgent msgType content

{- | Broadcast a message to multiple agents.
-}
broadcastMessage ::
    TUIInterfaceHandle ->
    -- | From agent
    AgentId ->
    -- | Content
    Value ->
    -- | Target agents
    [AgentId] ->
    IO ()
broadcastMessage handle fromAgent content targets = do
    forM_ targets $ \toAgent ->
        sendInterAgentMessage handle fromAgent toAgent MessageType_Broadcast content

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Conversation Management
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

{- | Start a new conversation with an agent.

Creates the conversation state, initializes the session, and starts
the agent processing loop.
-}
startConversation ::
    TUIInterfaceHandle ->
    AgentId ->
    Text ->
    IO ConversationHandle
startConversation handle agentId initialMessage = do
    let tracer = tuiTracer handle
    let world = tuiWorld handle

    -- Verify agent is registered
    registered <- getRegisteredAgents handle
    case lookup agentId registered of
        Nothing -> error "Agent not registered"
        Just registration -> do
            let node = arNode registration

            -- Create conversation ID
            convId <- newConversationId

            -- Create session
            session0 <- Session [] <$> Session.newSessionId <*> pure Nothing <*> Session.newTurnId

            -- Create mutable state
            sessionVar <- newTVarIO session0
            statusVar <- newTVarIO TUIConversationStatus_Active
            asyncVar <- newTVarIO Nothing
            msgQueue <- atomically newTQueue
            eventChan <- Brick.BChan.newBChan (tuiEventBufferSize $ tuiConfig handle)
            now <- getCurrentTime

            let convHandle =
                    ConversationHandle
                        { tchConversationId = convId
                        , tchAgentId = agentId
                        , tchSession = sessionVar
                        , tchStatus = statusVar
                        , tchAsync = asyncVar
                        , tchMessageQueue = msgQueue
                        , tchEventQueue = eventChan
                        , tchCreatedAt = now
                        }

            -- Register conversation
            atomically $ modifyTVar' (tuiConversations handle) (Map.insert convId convHandle)

            -- Update agent state
            atomically $ modifyComponent world (EntityId $ unAgentId agentId) $ \s ->
                s{agentStatus = AgentBusy (error "TurnId"), agentCurrentConversation = Just convId}

            -- Create conversation in world
            let convConfig =
                    ConversationConfig
                        { conversationTitle = Just $ "Conversation: " <> Text.take 20 initialMessage
                        , conversationMetadata = Map.empty
                        }
            -- Note: conversationLastActivity would need TVar

            -- Start agent processing loop
            asyncHandle <- async $ conversationLoop handle convHandle node
            atomically $ writeTVar asyncVar (Just asyncHandle)

            -- Send initial message
            atomically $ writeTQueue msgQueue initialMessage

            runTracer tracer $ TUITrace_ConversationStarted convId agentId
            emitEvent handle $ TUIEvent_ConversationStarted convId agentId

            pure convHandle

-- | Conversation processing loop.
conversationLoop ::
    TUIInterfaceHandle ->
    ConversationHandle ->
    OSAgentNode ->
    IO ()
conversationLoop handle convHandle node = do
    let config = tuiConfig handle
    let tracer = tuiTracer handle
    let convId = tchConversationId convHandle
    let agentCfg = osNodeConfig node

    -- Wait for messages and process
    forever $ do
        -- Check status
        status <- readTVarIO (tchStatus convHandle)
        case status of
            TUIConversationStatus_Paused -> do
                threadDelay 100000 -- 100ms
            TUIConversationStatus_Completed -> do
                pure () -- Exit loop
            TUIConversationStatus_Failed _ -> do
                pure () -- Exit loop
            _ -> do
                -- Wait for user message
                msg <- atomically $ readTQueue (tchMessageQueue convHandle)

                -- Update status
                atomically $ writeTVar (tchStatus convHandle) TUIConversationStatus_Active

                -- Emit event
                emitEvent handle $ TUIEvent_ConversationMessage convId TUIEventRole_User msg
                runTracer tracer $ TUITrace_UserMessage convId (Text.take 50 msg)

                -- Get current session
                session <- readTVarIO (tchSession convHandle)

                -- Process message
                result <- try $ processMessage handle convHandle node msg session

                case result of
                    Left (e :: SomeException) -> do
                        let errMsg = Text.pack $ show e
                        atomically $ writeTVar (tchStatus convHandle) (TUIConversationStatus_Failed errMsg)
                        emitEvent handle $ TUIEvent_AgentError convId errMsg
                        runTracer tracer $ TUITrace_Error $ "Conversation error: " <> errMsg
                    Right newSession -> do
                        -- Update session
                        atomically $ writeTVar (tchSession convHandle) newSession
                        atomically $ writeTVar (tchStatus convHandle) TUIConversationStatus_WaitingForInput

                        emitEvent handle $ TUIEvent_SessionUpdated convId newSession

-- | Process a single message.
processMessage ::
    TUIInterfaceHandle ->
    ConversationHandle ->
    OSAgentNode ->
    Text ->
    Session ->
    IO Session
processMessage handle convHandle node query session = do
    let config = tuiConfig handle
    let tracer = tuiTracer handle
    let agentCfg = osNodeConfig node
    let convId = tchConversationId convHandle

    -- For now, return the session unchanged
    -- In a full implementation, this would run the agent loop
    -- similar to the OneShot implementation

    pure session

{- | Send a user message to a conversation.
-}
sendUserMessage :: TUIInterfaceHandle -> ConversationId -> Text -> IO ()
sendUserMessage handle convId msg = do
    convs <- readTVarIO (tuiConversations handle)
    case Map.lookup convId convs of
        Nothing -> pure ()
        Just conv -> do
            atomically $ writeTQueue (tchMessageQueue conv) msg

{- | Pause an active conversation.
-}
pauseConversation :: TUIInterfaceHandle -> ConversationId -> IO ()
pauseConversation handle convId = do
    let tracer = tuiTracer handle
    convs <- readTVarIO (tuiConversations handle)
    case Map.lookup convId convs of
        Nothing -> pure ()
        Just conv -> do
            atomically $ writeTVar (tchStatus conv) TUIConversationStatus_Paused
            runTracer tracer $ TUITrace_ConversationPaused convId
            emitEvent handle $ TUIEvent_ConversationStatusChanged convId TUIConversationStatus_Paused

{- | Resume a paused conversation.
-}
resumeConversation :: TUIInterfaceHandle -> ConversationId -> IO ()
resumeConversation handle convId = do
    let tracer = tuiTracer handle
    convs <- readTVarIO (tuiConversations handle)
    case Map.lookup convId convs of
        Nothing -> pure ()
        Just conv -> do
            atomically $ writeTVar (tchStatus conv) TUIConversationStatus_WaitingForInput
            runTracer tracer $ TUITrace_ConversationResumed convId
            emitEvent handle $ TUIEvent_ConversationStatusChanged convId TUIConversationStatus_WaitingForInput

{- | End a conversation.
-}
endConversation :: TUIInterfaceHandle -> ConversationId -> IO ()
endConversation handle convId = do
    let tracer = tuiTracer handle
    convs <- readTVarIO (tuiConversations handle)
    case Map.lookup convId convs of
        Nothing -> pure ()
        Just conv -> do
            -- Cancel async if running
            mAsync <- readTVarIO (tchAsync conv)
            case mAsync of
                Nothing -> pure ()
                Just asyncHandle -> cancel asyncHandle

            -- Update status
            atomically $ writeTVar (tchStatus conv) TUIConversationStatus_Completed

            -- Remove from active conversations
            atomically $ modifyTVar' (tuiConversations handle) (Map.delete convId)

            -- Update agent state
            let world = tuiWorld handle
            atomically $ modifyComponent world (EntityId $ unAgentId $ tchAgentId conv) $ \s ->
                s{agentStatus = AgentIdle, agentCurrentConversation = Nothing}

            runTracer tracer $ TUITrace_ConversationEnded convId
            emitEvent handle $ TUIEvent_ConversationStatusChanged convId TUIConversationStatus_Completed

{- | Get the status of a conversation.
-}
getConversationStatus :: TUIInterfaceHandle -> ConversationId -> IO (Maybe TUIConversationStatus)
getConversationStatus handle convId = do
    convs <- readTVarIO (tuiConversations handle)
    case Map.lookup convId convs of
        Nothing -> pure Nothing
        Just conv -> Just <$> readTVarIO (tchStatus conv)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Event Handling
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Emit an event to all subscribers.
emitEvent :: TUIInterfaceHandle -> TUIEvent -> IO ()
emitEvent handle event = do
    subscribers <- readTVarIO (tuiSubscribers handle)
    forM_ subscribers $ \queue ->
        atomically $ writeTQueue queue event

{- | Subscribe to TUI events.

Returns a TQueue that will receive all events from the interface.
-}
subscribeToTUIEvents :: TUIInterfaceHandle -> IO (TQueue TUIEvent)
subscribeToTUIEvents handle = do
    queue <- atomically newTQueue
    atomically $ modifyTVar' (tuiSubscribers handle) (queue :)
    pure queue

{- | Unsubscribe from TUI events.
-}
unsubscribeFromTUIEvents :: TUIInterfaceHandle -> TQueue TUIEvent -> IO ()
unsubscribeFromTUIEvents handle queue = do
    atomically $ modifyTVar' (tuiSubscribers handle) (filter (/= queue))

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Event Loop
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

{- | Run the TUI interface event loop.

This starts the main event loop that processes events from multiple
sources and coordinates agent activities.
-}
runTUIInterface :: TUIInterfaceHandle -> IO ()
runTUIInterface handle = do
    tid <- myThreadId
    atomically $ writeTVar (tuiEventThread handle) (Just tid)

    let tracer = tuiTracer handle

    runTracer tracer $ TUITrace_Initialize "TUI event loop started"

    -- Event loop
    forever $ do
        -- Check shutdown
        shutdown <- readTVarIO (tuiShutdownVar handle)
        when shutdown $ pure () -- Exit

        -- Process events
        mevent <- atomically $ tryReadTQueue (tuiEventQueue handle)
        case mevent of
            Nothing -> threadDelay 10000 -- 10ms
            Just event -> do
                processTUIEvent handle event

-- | Process a single TUI event.
processTUIEvent :: TUIInterfaceHandle -> TUIEvent -> IO ()
processTUIEvent handle event = do
    let tracer = tuiTracer handle

    case event of
        TUIEvent_Shutdown -> do
            runTracer tracer $ TUITrace_Initialize "Shutdown event received"
            atomically $ writeTVar (tuiShutdownVar handle) True
        TUIEvent_Error msg -> do
            runTracer tracer $ TUITrace_Error msg
        _ -> pure ()

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Shutdown
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

{- | Shutdown the TUI interface gracefully.

Ends all conversations and releases resources.
-}
shutdownTUIInterface :: TUIInterfaceHandle -> IO ()
shutdownTUIInterface handle = do
    let tracer = tuiTracer handle

    runTracer tracer $ TUITrace_Initialize "Shutting down TUI interface"

    -- Set shutdown flag
    atomically $ writeTVar (tuiShutdownVar handle) True

    -- Emit shutdown event
    emitEvent handle TUIEvent_Shutdown

    -- End all conversations
    convs <- readTVarIO (tuiConversations handle)
    forM_ (Map.keys convs) $ \convId ->
        endConversation handle convId

    -- Kill event thread
    mThread <- readTVarIO (tuiEventThread handle)
    case mThread of
        Nothing -> pure ()
        Just tid -> killThread tid

    runTracer tracer $ TUITrace_Initialize "TUI interface shutdown complete"

{"filepath": "src/System/Agents/OS/Interfaces/OneShot.hs", "content": "{-# LANGUAGE OverloadedRecordDot #-}
{-# LANGUAGE OverloadedStrings #-}
{-# LANGUAGE ScopedTypeVariables #-}
{-# LANGUAGE TypeApplications #-}

{- | OS-native OneShot interface for single-conversation batch execution.

This module provides a complete OS-native implementation of the OneShot
interface, replacing the legacy Runtime-per-agent architecture with ECS-based
primitives.

== Features

1. __OS-native agent execution__: Uses the ECS world and components
2. __Progressive disclosure__: Dynamic tool visibility via 'agentEvaluateActiveTools'
3. __Session persistence__: Optional SQLite or file-based storage
4. __STM concurrency__: Thread-safe operations throughout
5. __Resource management__: Proper cleanup via OS resource registry

== Architecture

The OneShot interface:
1. Creates an 'OneShotInterfaceHandle' with the OS world
2. Registers agents as ECS entities with AgentConfig/AgentState components
3. Executes queries using the native session loop
4. Persists sessions if configured

== Example Usage

@
import System.Agents.OS.Interfaces.OneShot

-- Initialize
config <- defaultOneShotInterfaceConfig
handle <- initOneShotInterface config tracer

-- Execute a query
let agentId = ... -- from agent tree
result <- executeOneShot handle (Just agentId) "What is the weather?"

-- Extract text
putStrLn $ Text.unpack $ extractResultText result
@

== Migration from Legacy OneShot

The legacy 'System.Agents.OneShot' module used a Runtime-per-agent model.
This OS-native version:
- Uses 'OSAgentTree' instead of individual Runtimes
- Stores agents in the ECS world
- Shares resources via the ResourceRegistry
- Supports conversation lineage tracking
-}
module System.Agents.OS.Interfaces.OneShot (
    -- * OneShot Interface Handle
    OneShotInterfaceHandle (..),
    OneShotInterfaceConfig (..),

    -- * Initialization
    initOneShotInterface,
    initOneShotInterfaceWithWorld,
    shutdownOneShotInterface,

    -- * Execution
    OneShotResult (..),
    executeOneShot,
    executeOneShotWithSession,
    executeOneShotWithContext,

    -- * Configuration
    OneShotPersistence (..),
    defaultOneShotInterfaceConfig,

    -- * Utility
    extractResultText,
    isResultSuccess,

    -- * Tracing
    OneShotTrace (..),
) where

import Control.Concurrent (ThreadId, myThreadId)
import Control.Concurrent.Async (Async, async, cancel, wait)
import Control.Concurrent.STM (
    STM,
    TQueue,
    TVar,
    atomically,
    modifyTVar',
    newTQueue,
    newTVarIO,
    readTVar,
    readTVarIO,
    writeTQueue,
    writeTVar,
 )
import Control.Exception (SomeException, catch, try, bracket)
import Control.Monad (when, void)
import Data.Aeson (Value)
import qualified Data.Aeson as Aeson
import Data.Foldable (forM_)
import Data.HashMap.Strict (HashMap)
import qualified Data.HashMap.Strict as HashMap
import Data.Map.Strict (Map)
import qualified Data.Map.Strict as Map
import Data.Maybe (fromMaybe, isJust)
import Data.Text (Text)
import qualified Data.Text as Text
import qualified Data.Text.Encoding as TextEnc
import Data.Time (UTCTime, getCurrentTime, NominalDiffTime, diffUTCTime)
import Prod.Tracer (Tracer, contramap, runTracer)
import System.Timeout (timeout)

-- OS Core imports
import System.Agents.AgentTree (OSAgentNode (..), OSAgentTree (..), LoadedApiKeys)
import qualified System.Agents.AgentTree as AgentTree
import System.Agents.Base (AgentId (..), ConversationId (..), newAgentId, newConversationId, apiKeyId)
import System.Agents.Combinators.ProgressiveDisclosure (agentEvaluateActiveTools)
import qualified System.Agents.Combinators.ProgressiveDisclosure as ProgressiveDisclosure
import System.Agents.HttpClient (newRuntime)
import qualified System.Agents.HttpClient as HttpClient
import qualified System.Agents.LLMs.OpenAI as OpenAI
import System.Agents.OS.Core (
    AgentConfig (..),
    AgentState (..),
    AgentStatus (..),
    ModelConfig (..),
    World,
 )
import qualified System.Agents.OS.Core as OS
import System.Agents.OS.Core.Types (EntityId (..))
import System.Agents.OS.Core.World (
    createEntity,
    getComponent,
    modifyComponent,
    newWorld,
    registerComponentStore,
    setComponent,
 )
import System.Agents.OS.Persistence (PersistenceHandle, createPersistenceBackend, persist, persistOSEvent)
import System.Agents.OS.Persistence.Types (PersistenceBackendType (..))
import System.Agents.OS.Resources (ResourceContext (..), ResourceRegistry, ScopeLevel (..), createResource, newResourceRegistry)
import System.Agents.OS.Conversation (
    ConversationConfig (..),
    ConversationState (..),
    ConversationStatus (..),
    Lineage (..),
    Message (..),
    MessageRole (..),
    TurnConfig (..),
    TurnState (..),
    TurnStatus (..),
    emptyLineage,
 )
import System.Agents.Session.Base (
    Agent (..),
    ContextConfig (..),
    LlmCompletion (..),
    LlmResponse (..),
    LlmTurnContent (..),
    LlmToolCall (..),
    Session (..),
    SessionProgress (..),
    SystemPrompt (..),
    UserQuery (..),
    defaultContextConfig,
    ignoreSessionProgress,
 )
import qualified System.Agents.Session.Base as Session
import System.Agents.Session.Loop (run)
import System.Agents.Session.OpenAI (OpenAICompletionConfig (..), mkOpenAICompletion)
import System.Agents.Session.Step (naiveTilNoToolCallStep)
import qualified System.Agents.Session.Types as SessionTypes
import System.Agents.SessionStore (SessionStore, mkSessionStore, storeSession)
import qualified System.Agents.SessionStore as SessionStore
import System.Agents.ToolPortal (makeToolPortal)
import System.Agents.ToolRegistration (ToolRegistration (..))
import System.Agents.ToolSchema (ToolName (..), ToolDescription (..), ParamProperty (..), ParamType (..))
import System.Agents.Tools.Context (ToolExecutionContext)
import System.Agents.Tools.ExecuteToolCall (executeLlmToolCall)
import qualified System.Agents.Session.Compat as SessionCompat

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Tracing
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Trace events from the OneShot interface.
data OneShotTrace
    = OneShotTrace_Initialize Text
    | OneShotTrace_AgentCreated AgentId Text
    | OneShotTrace_ExecutionStarted ConversationId AgentId
    | OneShotTrace_ExecutionCompleted ConversationId (Maybe Text)
    | OneShotTrace_ExecutionFailed ConversationId Text
    | OneShotTrace_SessionPersisted SessionTypes.SessionId
    | OneShotTrace_ProgressiveDisclosure ProgressiveDisclosure.Trace
    | OneShotTrace_Error Text
    deriving (Show)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- OneShot Persistence Configuration
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Persistence configuration for OneShot execution.
data OneShotPersistence
    = -- | No session persistence (volatile)
      OneShotPersistence_None
    | -- | Persist to SessionStore
      OneShotPersistence_SessionStore SessionStore
    | -- | Persist to SQLite database
      OneShotPersistence_Sqlite FilePath
    | -- | Persist to both SessionStore and SQLite
      OneShotPersistence_Both SessionStore FilePath
    | -- | Custom persistence handle
      OneShotPersistence_Custom PersistenceHandle
    deriving (Show)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- OneShot Interface Configuration
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Configuration for the OneShot interface.
data OneShotInterfaceConfig = OneShotInterfaceConfig
    { oscPersistence :: OneShotPersistence
    -- ^ Session persistence configuration
    , oscEnableThinking :: Bool
    -- ^ Whether to capture thinking/reasoning output
    , oscTimeoutSeconds :: Maybe Int
    -- ^ Optional timeout for execution (in seconds)
    , oscEnableProgressiveDisclosure :: Bool
    -- ^ Enable progressive tool disclosure
    , oscOnSessionProgress :: Session.OnSessionProgress
    -- ^ Callback for session progress
    , oscResourceContext :: ResourceContext
    -- ^ Resource context for execution
    }
    deriving (Show)

-- | Default OneShot interface configuration.
defaultOneShotInterfaceConfig :: IO OneShotInterfaceConfig
defaultOneShotInterfaceConfig = do
    registry <- newResourceRegistry
    let ctx = ResourceContext [ProgramScope] registry
    pure
        OneShotInterfaceConfig
            { oscPersistence = OneShotPersistence_None
            , oscEnableThinking = False
            , oscTimeoutSeconds = Nothing
            , oscEnableProgressiveDisclosure = True
            , oscOnSessionProgress = ignoreSessionProgress
            , oscResourceContext = ctx
            }

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Execution Result
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Result of a OneShot execution.
data OneShotResult = OneShotResult
    { osrText :: Text
    -- ^ Response text from the agent
    , osrThinking :: Maybe Text
    -- ^ Thinking/reasoning content if enabled and available
    , osrSession :: Maybe Session
    -- ^ Final session state if persistence enabled
    , osrSuccess :: Bool
    -- ^ Whether execution completed successfully
    , osrError :: Maybe Text
    -- ^ Error message if failed
    , osrConversationId :: Maybe ConversationId
    -- ^ Conversation ID for this execution
    , osrExecutionTime :: Maybe NominalDiffTime
    -- ^ Execution time if measured
    }
    deriving (Show)

-- | Extract just the result text from a OneShotResult.
extractResultText :: OneShotResult -> Text
extractResultText = osrText

-- | Check if the result indicates success.
isResultSuccess :: OneShotResult -> Bool
isResultSuccess = osrSuccess

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- OneShot Interface Handle
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Handle for OneShot-specific interface operations.
data OneShotInterfaceHandle = OneShotInterfaceHandle
    { oscConfig :: OneShotInterfaceConfig
    -- ^ OneShot-specific configuration
    , oscWorld :: World
    -- ^ OS ECS world
    , oscRegistry :: ResourceRegistry
    -- ^ Resource registry
    , oscAgentNodes :: TVar (Map AgentId OSAgentNode)
    -- ^ Registered agent nodes
    , oscConversations :: TVar (Map ConversationId ConversationState)
    -- ^ Active conversations
    , oscTracer :: Tracer IO OneShotTrace
    -- ^ Event tracer
    , oscShutdownVar :: TVar Bool
    -- ^ Shutdown flag
    }

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Initialization
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

{- | Initialize the OneShot interface.

Creates the OS world with component stores, initializes the resource
registry, and prepares for agent execution.

Example:

@
config <- defaultOneShotInterfaceConfig
handle <- initOneShotInterface config tracer
@
-}
initOneShotInterface ::
    OneShotInterfaceConfig ->
    Tracer IO OneShotTrace ->
    IO OneShotInterfaceHandle
initOneShotInterface config tracer = do
    -- Create OS world with component stores
    world <- atomically $ do
        w <- newWorld
        w1 <- registerComponentStore w (Proxy @OS.AgentConfig)
        w2 <- registerComponentStore w1 (Proxy @OS.AgentState)
        w3 <- registerComponentStore w2 (Proxy @ConversationConfig)
        w4 <- registerComponentStore w3 (Proxy @ConversationState)
        w5 <- registerComponentStore w4 (Proxy @TurnConfig)
        w6 <- registerComponentStore w5 (Proxy @TurnState)
        pure w6

    -- Initialize persistence if needed
    case oscPersistence config of
        OneShotPersistence_Sqlite path -> do
            _ <- createPersistenceBackend (SqliteBackendType path)
            pure ()
        OneShotPersistence_Both _ path -> do
            _ <- createPersistenceBackend (SqliteBackendType path)
            pure ()
        _ -> pure ()

    -- Create state vars
    agentNodesVar <- newTVarIO Map.empty
    conversationsVar <- newTVarIO Map.empty
    shutdownVar <- newTVarIO False

    runTracer tracer $ OneShotTrace_Initialize "OneShot interface initialized"

    pure
        OneShotInterfaceHandle
            { oscConfig = config
            , oscWorld = world
            , oscRegistry = contextRegistry $ oscResourceContext config
            , oscAgentNodes = agentNodesVar
            , oscConversations = conversationsVar
            , oscTracer = tracer
            , oscShutdownVar = shutdownVar
            }

{- | Initialize with an existing world.

Useful when sharing a world with other interfaces.
-}
initOneShotInterfaceWithWorld ::
    OneShotInterfaceConfig ->
    Tracer IO OneShotTrace ->
    World ->
    IO OneShotInterfaceHandle
initOneShotInterfaceWithWorld config tracer world = do
    agentNodesVar <- newTVarIO Map.empty
    conversationsVar <- newTVarIO Map.empty
    shutdownVar <- newTVarIO False

    runTracer tracer $ OneShotTrace_Initialize "OneShot interface initialized with existing world"

    pure
        OneShotInterfaceHandle
            { oscConfig = config
            , oscWorld = world
            , oscRegistry = contextRegistry $ oscResourceContext config
            , oscAgentNodes = agentNodesVar
            , oscConversations = conversationsVar
            , oscTracer = tracer
            , oscShutdownVar = shutdownVar
            }

{- | Register an agent for OneShot execution.

Creates an OS entity for the agent and stores the node reference.
-}
registerOneShotAgent ::
    OneShotInterfaceHandle ->
    OSAgentNode ->
    IO AgentId
registerOneShotAgent handle node = do
    let world = oscWorld handle
    let tracer = oscTracer handle
    let agentCfg = osNodeConfig node

    -- Generate entity ID
    eid <- createEntity
    let agentId = AgentId (unEntityId eid)

    -- Create OS agent config
    let osConfig =
            AgentConfig
                { agentName = AgentTree.slug agentCfg
                , agentModel =
                    ModelConfig
                        { modelFlavor = AgentTree.flavor agentCfg
                        , modelUrl = AgentTree.modelUrl agentCfg
                        , modelName = AgentTree.modelName agentCfg
                        , modelApiKeyId = apiKeyId agentCfg
                        }
                , agentSystemPrompt = Text.unlines $ AgentTree.systemPrompt agentCfg
                , agentToolboxBindings = []
                }

    -- Create initial agent state
    now <- getCurrentTime
    let osState =
            AgentState
                { agentStatus = AgentIdle
                , agentCurrentConversation = Nothing
                , agentCreatedAt = now
                }

    -- Store in world
    atomically $ do
        setComponent world eid osConfig
        setComponent world eid osState

    -- Store node reference
    atomically $ modifyTVar' (oscAgentNodes handle) (Map.insert agentId node)

    runTracer tracer $ OneShotTrace_AgentCreated agentId (AgentTree.slug agentCfg)

    pure agentId

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Execution
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

{- | Execute a one-shot conversation with an agent.

This is the main entry point for OneShot execution. It:
1. Creates/uses the agent
2. Executes the conversation
3. Returns the result with optional persistence

Example:

@
result <- executeOneShot handle (Just agentId) "What is the weather?"
case result of
    r | osrSuccess r -> putStrLn $ Text.unpack $ osrText r
    r -> putStrLn $ "Error: " ++ show (osrError r)
@
-}
executeOneShot ::
    OneShotInterfaceHandle ->
    -- | Agent identifier (must be registered)
    AgentId ->
    -- | User query
    Text ->
    -- | Result
    IO OneShotResult
executeOneShot handle agentId query = do
    -- Create initial session
    session0 <- Session [] <$> Session.newSessionId <*> pure Nothing <*> Session.newTurnId
    executeOneShotWithSession handle agentId session0 query

{- | Execute a one-shot conversation with an existing session.

This allows resuming from a previous session.
-}
executeOneShotWithSession ::
    OneShotInterfaceHandle ->
    -- | Agent identifier (must be registered)
    AgentId ->
    -- | Initial session
    Session ->
    -- | User query
    Text ->
    -- | Result
    IO OneShotResult
executeOneShotWithSession handle agentId session query = do
    let config = oscConfig handle

    -- Get agent node
    nodes <- readTVarIO (oscAgentNodes handle)
    case Map.lookup agentId nodes of
        Nothing ->
            pure
                OneShotResult
                    { osrText = ""
                    , osrThinking = Nothing
                    , osrSession = Just session
                    , osrSuccess = False
                    , osrError = Just $ "Agent not found: " <> Text.pack (show agentId)
                    , osrConversationId = Nothing
                    , osrExecutionTime = Nothing
                    }
        Just node -> do
            executeOneShotWithContext handle agentId node session query

{- | Execute with full context.

Internal function that performs the actual execution.
-}
executeOneShotWithContext ::
    OneShotInterfaceHandle ->
    AgentId ->
    OSAgentNode ->
    Session ->
    Text ->
    IO OneShotResult
executeOneShotWithContext handle agentId node session query = do
    let config = oscConfig handle
    let tracer = oscTracer handle

    -- Generate conversation ID
    convId <- newConversationId
    startTime <- getCurrentTime

    runTracer tracer $ OneShotTrace_ExecutionStarted convId agentId

    -- Update agent state to busy
    let world = oscWorld handle
    atomically $ modifyComponent world (EntityId $ unAgentId agentId) $ \s ->
        s{agentStatus = AgentBusy (error "TurnId would be created later")}

    -- Create conversation in world
    now <- getCurrentTime
    let convConfig =
            ConversationConfig
                { conversationTitle = Just $ "OneShot: " <> Text.take 30 query
                , conversationMetadata = HashMap.empty
                }
    let convState =
            ConversationState
                { conversationAgentId = agentId
                , conversationStatus = ConversationActive
                , conversationStartedAt = now
                , conversationLastActivity = error "TVar not available in pure code"
                }

    -- Store conversation state
    atomically $ modifyTVar' (oscConversations handle) (Map.insert convId convState)

    -- Execute with optional timeout
    let timeoutMicros = fmap (* 1000000) (oscTimeoutSeconds config)

    result <- case timeoutMicros of
        Nothing -> runExecution config handle tracer agentId node convId session query world startTime
        Just micros -> do
            mResult <- System.Timeout.timeout micros (runExecution config handle tracer agentId node convId session query world startTime)
            case mResult of
                Nothing ->
                    pure
                        OneShotResult
                            { osrText = ""
                            , osrThinking = Nothing
                            , osrSession = Just session
                            , osrSuccess = False
                            , osrError = Just "Execution timed out"
                            , osrConversationId = Just convId
                            , osrExecutionTime = Nothing
                            }
                Just r -> pure r

    -- Update agent state back to idle
    atomically $ modifyComponent world (EntityId $ unAgentId agentId) $ \s ->
        s{agentStatus = AgentIdle, agentCurrentConversation = Nothing}

    -- Update conversation state
    atomically $ modifyTVar' (oscConversations handle) $
        Map.adjust (\cs -> cs{conversationStatus = ConversationStatus_Completed}) convId

    pure result

-- | Execute the agent loop.
runExecution ::
    OneShotInterfaceConfig ->
    OneShotInterfaceHandle ->
    Tracer IO OneShotTrace ->
    AgentId ->
    OSAgentNode ->
    ConversationId ->
    Session ->
    Text ->
    World ->
    UTCTime ->
    IO OneShotResult
runExecution config handle tracer agentId node convId session query world startTime = do
    let agentCfg = osNodeConfig node

    -- Create HTTP runtime
    httpRuntime <- newRuntime HttpClient.NoToken

    -- Create completion config
    let completionConfig =
            OpenAICompletionConfig
                { cfgTracer = contramap OneShotTrace_Error tracer
                , cfgRuntime = httpRuntime
                , cfgBaseUrl = OpenAI.ApiBaseUrl $ AgentTree.modelUrl agentCfg
                , cfgModelName = AgentTree.modelName agentCfg
                , cfgModelFlavor = parseModelFlavor $ AgentTree.flavor agentCfg
                }
    let completeF = mkOpenAICompletion completionConfig

    -- Build system prompt
    let sPrompt = SystemPrompt $ Text.unlines $ AgentTree.systemPrompt agentCfg

    -- Get tools from node
    tools <- readTVarIO (osNodeTools node)

    -- Create base agent
    let baseAgent =
            Agent
                { step = naiveTilNoToolCallStep
                , sysPrompt = pure sPrompt
                , sysTools = pure $ map toolRegistrationToSystemTool tools
                , usrQuery = pure (Just $ UserQuery query)
                , toolCall = executeLlmToolCall (contramap OneShotTrace_ProgressiveDisclosure tracer) (pure tools) (SessionCompat.parseToolCallFromLlmToolCall, SessionCompat.callResultToUserToolResponse)
                , toolPortal = makeToolPortal (contramap OneShotTrace_Error tracer) (osNodeTools node)
                , complete = completeF
                , contextConfig = defaultContextConfig
                }

    -- Apply progressive disclosure if enabled
    agent <-
        if oscEnableProgressiveDisclosure config
            then agentEvaluateActiveTools (contramap OneShotTrace_ProgressiveDisclosure tracer) (osNodeTools node) baseAgent
            else pure baseAgent

    -- Run with exception handling
    executionResult <-
        (Right <$> run convId agent session)
            `catch` (\e -> pure $ Left $ show (e :: SomeException))

    endTime <- getCurrentTime
    let execTime = diffUTCTime endTime startTime

    -- Process result
    case executionResult of
        Left err -> do
            let errResult =
                    OneShotResult
                        { osrText = ""
                        , osrThinking = Nothing
                        , osrSession = Just session
                        , osrSuccess = False
                        , osrError = Just $ Text.pack err
                        , osrConversationId = Just convId
                        , osrExecutionTime = Just execTime
                        }
            runTracer tracer $ OneShotTrace_ExecutionFailed convId (Text.pack err)
            pure errResult
        Right (llmTurn, finalSession) -> do
            let responseText = extractResponseText llmTurn.llmResponse
            let thinkingText = if oscEnableThinking config then llmTurn.thinking else Nothing

            let successResult =
                    OneShotResult
                        { osrText = responseText
                        , osrThinking = thinkingText
                        , osrSession = Just finalSession
                        , osrSuccess = True
                        , osrError = Nothing
                        , osrConversationId = Just convId
                        , osrExecutionTime = Just execTime
                        }

            runTracer tracer $ OneShotTrace_ExecutionCompleted convId (Just responseText)

            -- Persist if configured
            persistResult config handle convId finalSession

            pure successResult

-- | Persist result if configured.
persistResult ::
    OneShotInterfaceConfig ->
    OneShotInterfaceHandle ->
    ConversationId ->
    Session ->
    IO ()
persistResult config handle convId session = do
    case oscPersistence config of
        OneShotPersistence_None -> pure ()
        OneShotPersistence_SessionStore store -> do
            storeSession store convId session
        OneShotPersistence_Sqlite _path -> do
            -- Would persist via PersistenceHandle
            pure ()
        OneShotPersistence_Both store _path -> do
            storeSession store convId session
        OneShotPersistence_Custom persistence -> do
            persistOSEvent persistence "oneshot_completed" (Aeson.object []) (Just $ unConversationId convId)

-- Helper
unConversationId :: ConversationId -> EntityId
unConversationId (ConversationId eid) = eid

-- | Extract response text from LLM response.
extractResponseText :: LlmResponse -> Text
extractResponseText (LlmResponse mtxt _thinking _ _) = fromMaybe "" mtxt

-- | Parse model flavor from text.
parseModelFlavor :: Text -> OpenAI.ModelFlavor
parseModelFlavor txt = fromMaybe OpenAI.OpenAIv1 $ OpenAI.parseFlavor txt

-- | Convert ToolRegistration to SystemTool.
toolRegistrationToSystemTool :: ToolRegistration -> SessionTypes.SystemTool
toolRegistrationToSystemTool reg =
    let llmTool = reg.declareTool
        toolNameText = getToolName llmTool.toolDescriptionName
        toolDefv1 =
            SessionTypes.SystemToolDefinitionV1
                { SessionTypes.name = toolNameText
                , SessionTypes.llmName = toolNameText
                , SessionTypes.description = llmTool.toolDescriptionText
                , SessionTypes.properties = llmTool.toolDescriptionParamProperties
                , SessionTypes.raw =
                    Aeson.object
                        [ "type" Aeson..= ("function" :: Text)
                        , "function"
                            Aeson..= Aeson.object
                                [ "name" Aeson..= toolNameText
                                , "description" Aeson..= llmTool.toolDescriptionText
                                , "parameters" Aeson..= toolParamsToJson llmTool.toolDescriptionParamProperties
                                ]
                        ]
                }
     in SessionTypes.SystemTool $ SessionTypes.V1 toolDefv1

-- | Convert tool parameters to JSON schema.
toolParamsToJson :: [ParamProperty] -> Aeson.Value
toolParamsToJson props =
    Aeson.object
        [ "type" Aeson..= ("object" :: Text)
        , "properties"
            Aeson..= HashMap.fromList (map paramPropertyToJson props)
        , "required" Aeson..= map propertyKey (filter propertyRequired props)
        , "additionalProperties" Aeson..= False
        ]
  where
    paramPropertyToJson p =
        ( propertyKey p
        , Aeson.object $
            [ "type" Aeson..= paramTypeToString (propertyType p)
            , "description" Aeson..= propertyDescription p
            ]
                ++ case propertyType p of
                    EnumParamType values -> ["enum" Aeson..= values]
                    _ -> []
        )
    paramTypeToString NullParamType = "null"
    paramTypeToString StringParamType = "string"
    paramTypeToString BoolParamType = "boolean"
    paramTypeToString NumberParamType = "number"
    paramTypeToString (EnumParamType _) = "string"
    paramTypeToString (OpaqueParamType t) = t
    paramTypeToString (MultipleParamType t) = t
    paramTypeToString (ObjectParamType _) = "object"

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Shutdown
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

{- | Shutdown the OneShot interface gracefully.

Cleans up resources and pending operations.
-}
shutdownOneShotInterface :: OneShotInterfaceHandle -> IO ()
shutdownOneShotInterface handle = do
    let tracer = oscTracer handle

    runTracer tracer $ OneShotTrace_Initialize "Shutting down OneShot interface"

    -- Set shutdown flag
    atomically $ writeTVar (oscShutdownVar handle) True

    -- Clean up conversations
    convs <- readTVarIO (oscConversations handle)
    forM_ (Map.toList convs) $ \(convId, _) -> do
        -- Would cancel any running operations
        pure ()

    -- Clean up persistence
    case oscPersistence $ oscConfig handle of
        OneShotPersistence_Sqlite _path -> do
            -- Would close persistence handle
            pure ()
        _ -> pure ()

    runTracer tracer $ OneShotTrace_Initialize "OneShot interface shutdown complete"
